items.title: Rust tests run much faster
items.oneliner: Rust test runner replaces cargo test with up to 3x faster runs, flaky-test retries, and CI-friendly isolation.

items.title: Local document search that works offline
items.oneliner: Clone this local RAG app to index PDFs and spreadsheets offline with semantic search and AI summaries.

items.title: NASA's spacecraft WebAssembly interpreter
items.oneliner: Flight-oriented Wasm interpreter shows how to run sandboxed binaries with deterministic memory on constrained systems.

items.title: TypeScript bots for the fediverse
items.oneliner: Build standalone ActivityPub bots in one TypeScript file without depending on Mastodon or third-party hosting.

items.title: Charts from compact semantic specs
items.oneliner: This chart language compiles concise specs into 46 chart types across Vega-Lite, ECharts, and Chart.js.

items.title: Coding agent benchmark on real code
items.oneliner: Useful benchmark compares coding agents on a multi-million-line codebase, including quality tiers and cost tradeoffs.

items.title: Browser robot simulator for quick experiments
items.oneliner: Program a robot dog in the browser, test motions instantly, and inspect serial-control workflows before touching hardware.

items.title: QR codes as a font
items.oneliner: This TrueType font turns bracketed text into inline QR codes without generating images or extra assets.

items.title: Call graphs for code exploration
items.oneliner: Explore unfamiliar repositories with multi-level call graphs that surface architecture and function relationships across languages.

items.title: Fast shaders with zero dependencies
items.oneliner: Drop zero-dependency shaders into React or GLSL projects to add polished effects without a graphics stack.
